column3: Stored only, CRC32 hash, no compression.
-m1 fastest compression on 64 KB of text.
Dictionary 128 KB (CompInfo encodes the explicit -md value).
Dictionary 1 MB. RAR clamps the requested dict to the input size, so values >1M (-md4m, etc.) round down to 1M for this 512 KB input.
